AVEMUJICA-MOONLIT_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
[gold]Dreamspin[/gold] {Dreamspin:diff()}.
AVEMUJICA-MOONLIT_STRIKE.title: Moonlit Strike

AVEMUJICA-MOONLIGHT_BARRIER.title: Moonlight Barrier
AVEMUJICA-NEW_MOON_AWAKENING.description:
[gold]Dreamspin[/gold] {Dreamspin:diff()}.
If the target is a [gold]Doll[/gold], give them {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] and [gold]Dexterity[/gold] this turn.
AVEMUJICA-NEW_MOON_AWAKENING.title: New Moon Awakening
AVEMUJICA-FIRST_QUARTER_YEARNING.title: First Quarter's Yearning
AVEMUJICA-WANING_MOON_DESIRE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
The oldest [gold]Doll[/gold] heals {Heal:diff()} HP.
AVEMUJICA-WANING_MOON_DESIRE.title: Waning Moon's Desire
AVEMUJICA-AFTERGLOW.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
The next time you [gold]Perform[/gold], gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
AVEMUJICA-AFTERGLOW.title: Afterglow
AVEMUJICA-REGRETS.title: Cast Off Regrets
AVEMUJICA-CRESCENDO.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies {Repeat:diff()} times.
AVEMUJICA-CRESCENDO.title: Crescendo
AVEMUJICA-DIMINUENDO.title: Diminuendo
AVEMUJICA-FERMATA.title: Fermata
AVEMUJICA-LATE_NIGHTS.title: Late Nights
AVEMUJICA-REHEARSAL.title: Rehearsal
AVEMUJICA-REPETITION.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Perform Attack Skill:[/gold] Deal {Damage:diff()} damage again.
AVEMUJICA-REPETITION.title: Repetition
AVEMUJICA-ALLEGRO.title: Allegro
AVEMUJICA-GLISSANDO.title: Glissando
AVEMUJICA-PROPER_TIMING.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Add [gold]Retain[/gold] to a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
AVEMUJICA-PROPER_TIMING.selectionScreenP: Select a card to add [gold]Retain[/gold] to.
AVEMUJICA-PROPER_TIMING.title: Proper Timing
AVEMUJICA-DISSATISFACTION.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add a [gold]Blank Song[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].

AVEMUJICA-DOLORIS.title: Doloris

AVEMUJICA-RECITAL.description: Put a [gold]Song[/gold] from your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
AVEMUJICA-RECITAL.selectionScreenPrompt: Choose a [gold]Song[/gold] to add to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
AVEMUJICA-RECITAL.title: Recital
AVEMUJICA-TRANSCRIBE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Add a copy of the in-progress [gold]Song[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

AVEMUJICA-DISTRIBUTE.description: Choose a [gold]Song[/gold]. Add {IfUpgraded:show:{Cards} copies|a copy} of that card into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

AVEMUJICA-FORTISSIMO.title: Fortissimo
AVEMUJICA-ARIA.title: Aria in Red
AVEMUJICA-A_CAPPELLA.title: A Cappella in Yellow
AVEMUJICA-DA_CAPO.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Upgraded[/gold]} [gold]Compose[/gold].
If you played a [gold]Song[/gold] this turn, add [gold]Replay[/gold] and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] to a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
AVEMUJICA-DA_CAPO.selectionScreenPrompt: Choose a card to add [gold]Replay[/gold] and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] to.
AVEMUJICA-DA_CAPO.title: Da Capo
AVEMUJICA-AL_CODA.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you played a [gold]Song[/gold] this turn, {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Upgraded [/gold]}[gold]Compose[/gold] twice.
AVEMUJICA-AL_CODA.title: Al Coda
AVEMUJICA-AL_FINE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
If you played a [gold]Song[/gold] this turn, [gold]Dreamspin[/gold] {Dreamspin:diff()}.
AVEMUJICA-AL_FINE.title: Al Fine
AVEMUJICA-CRESCENT_MOON_ECHOS.title: Crescent Moon Echos
AVEMUJICA-FULL_MOON_MASQUERADE.title: Full Moon Masquerade
AVEMUJICA-WAXING_MOON_LONGING.descriptio: Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to the total HP of your [gold]Dolls[/gold].{InCombat:\n(Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold])|}
AVEMUJICA-WAXING_MOON_LONGING.title: Waxing Moon's Longing
AVEMUJICA-WHITE_KEYS_BLACK_KEYS.title: White Keys, Black Keys
AVEMUJICA-CANON.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Perform Attack Skill:[/gold] Draw a card next turn.
AVEMUJICA-CANON.title: Canon in Green
AVEMUJICA-FULL_HOUSE.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for each time you [gold]Performed[/gold] this combat.
AVEMUJICA-FULL_HOUSE.title: Full House
AVEMUJICA-MAIDENS_CAPRICCIO.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
[gold]Perform Skill: Exhaust[/gold] up to {Exhaust:diff()} cards.

AVEMUJICA-EMOTIONAL_OUTBURST.title: Emotional Outburst
AVEMUJICA-SYMBOL_FIRE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
AVEMUJICA-SYMBOL_FIRE.title: Symbol I: Fire
AVEMUJICA-SYMBOL_AIR.title: Symbol II: Air
AVEMUJICA-FUGUE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
The next card you play that [gold]Exhausts[/gold] or [gold]Retains[/gold] costs [blue]0[/blue].
AVEMUJICA-FUGUE.title: Fugue in Grey
AVEMUJICA-SYMBOL_WATER.title: Symbol III: Water
AVEMUJICA-SYMBOL_EARTH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
When [gold]Retained[/gold], increase the number of hits by 1 this combat.
AVEMUJICA-SYMBOL_EARTH.title: Symbol IV: Earth
AVEMUJICA-CONCERTO.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Enchant[/gold] a card with [gold]Masterful[/gold] equal to the number of cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
AVEMUJICA-CONCERTO.title: Concerto in White
AVEMUJICA-WRITERS_BLOCK.title: Writer's Block
AVEMUJICA-INSPIRING_SONGS.description: Whenever you play {Cards:diff()} [gold]Songs[/gold] from your [gold]Hand[/gold], gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
AVEMUJICA-INSPIRING_SONGS.title: Inspiring Songs
AVEMUJICA-CANTABILE.title: Cantabile in Violet
AVEMUJICA-LARGE_REPERTOIRE.description: At the end of your turn, gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to the number of cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
AVEMUJICA-LARGE_REPERTOIRE.title: Large Repertoire
AVEMUJICA-MOONLIGHT_SONATA.title: Moonlight Sonata
AVEMUJICA-MELODY.description: At the end of your turn, if you [gold]Performed[/gold] this turn, gain {MelodyPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
AVEMUJICA-MELODY.title: Melody
AVEMUJICA-BAND_RECRUITMENT.description: Choose 1 of 3 {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Upgraded[/gold]} [gold]Awaken[/gold] cards to add to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
AVEMUJICA-BAND_RECRUITMENT.title: Band Recruitment
AVEMUJICA-IMPRISONED.title: Imprisoned XII
AVEMUJICA-ENCORE.title: Encore
AVEMUJICA-REQUIEM.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
[gold]Compose[/gold] "Lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP."
AVEMUJICA-REQUIEM.title: Requiem in Black
AVEMUJICA-MUSICA_CAELESTIS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Play a [gold]Song[/gold] in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold], then remove it from combat.
AVEMUJICA-MUSICA_CAELESTIS.title: Musica Caelestis
AVEMUJICA-ODE_TO_WAR.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Compose[/gold] "Deal {Compose:diff()} damage." until you finish [gold]Composing[/gold] a [gold]Song[/gold].
AVEMUJICA-ODE_TO_WAR.title: Ode To War
AVEMUJICA-SOPHIE.title: Sophie
AVEMUJICA-DO_NOT_FEAR_FORGETTING.title: Do Not Fear Forgetting
AVEMUJICA-BLOOD_MOON.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
[gold]Dreamspin[/gold] equal to the damage dealt.
AVEMUJICA-BLOOD_MOON.title: Blood Moon's Wrath
AVEMUJICA-TWO_MOONS.description:
[gold]Dreamspin[/gold] {Dreamspin:diff()}.
If the target is a [gold]Doll[/gold], they can use an additional [gold]Skill[/gold] this turn.
AVEMUJICA-TWO_MOONS.title: Two Moons
AVEMUJICA-BLUE_MOON.description: At the start of your turn, gain {BlueMoonPower:diff()} [gold]Dream Thread[/gold].
AVEMUJICA-BLUE_MOON.title: Blue Moon's Sorrow
AVEMUJICA-KNIGHTS_OF_OBLIVIONIS.descript: At the start of your turn, ALL [gold]Dolls[/gold] gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] and [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
AVEMUJICA-KNIGHTS_OF_OBLIVIONIS.title: Knights of Oblivionis
AVEMUJICA-FLAWLESS_PERFORMANCE.title: Flawless Performance
AVEMUJICA-BLACK_BIRTHDAY.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
[gold]Perform Attack Attack:[/gold] Hits {Repeat:diff()} more times.
AVEMUJICA-BLACK_BIRTHDAY.title: Black Birthday
AVEMUJICA-PERFECT_COMBO.description: Your [gold]Perform[/gold] effects trigger an additional time for each time a [gold]Perform[/gold] effect has triggered this turn.
AVEMUJICA-PERFECT_COMBO.title: Perfect Combo Storm
AVEMUJICA-GEORGETTE_ME.title: Georgette Me, Georgette You
AVEMUJICA-ENDLESS_PERFORMANCE.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever you [gold]Perform[/gold], put this into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
AVEMUJICA-ENDLESS_PERFORMANCE.title: Endless Performance
AVEMUJICA-ETHER.description:
Your cards that [gold]Retain[/gold] [gold]Exhaust[/gold] when played.
Your cards that [gold]Exhaust[/gold] when played cost 0.
AVEMUJICA-ETHER.title: Ether
AVEMUJICA-ALEA_IACTA_EST.description:
Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
If you take unblocked attack damage this combat, die.
AVEMUJICA-ALEA_IACTA_EST.title: Alea Iacta Est
AVEMUJICA-CONSIGN.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If [gold]Fatal[/gold], you may remove a card from your [gold]Deck[/gold] at the end of combat.
AVEMUJICA-CONSIGN.title: Consign to Oblivion
AVEMUJICA-LOFT_MOON.description:
[gold]Dreamspin[/gold] {Dreamspin:diff()}.
At the end of your turn, [gold]Dolls[/gold] gain {LoftMoonPower:diff()} HP.
AVEMUJICA-LOFT_MOON.title: Loft Moon
AVEMUJICA-PULL_FROM_OBLIVION.description: Put a card from your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

AVEMUJICA-PULL_FROM_OBLIVION.title: Pull From Oblivion
AVEMUJICA-VIRTUOSO_FORM.description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Enchant[/gold] ALL cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] with [gold]Masterful[/gold] {VirtuosoFormPower:diff()}.
AVEMUJICA-VIRTUOSO_FORM.title: Virtuoso's Form
AVEMUJICA-GARDEN.description: Whenever a [gold]Doll's Skill[/gold] is activated, draw {GardenPower:diff()} {GardenPower:plural:card|cards}.
AVEMUJICA-GARDEN.title: Garden of Lilies
AVEMUJICA-CRUCIFIX.title: Crucifix X
AVEMUJICA-PRELUDE.description: Put {Cards:diff()} cards from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold] and add [gold]Retain[/gold] to them.
AVEMUJICA-PRELUDE.title: Prelude in Blue
AVEMUJICA-PRELUDE.selectionScreenPrompt: Choose cards to put back in your Hand.
AVEMUJICA-PURSUIT_OF_MASTERY.description:
[gold]Enchant[/gold] a card with [gold]Masterful[/gold] {Enchant:diff()}.
When [gold]Retained[/gold], increase the amount by {EnchantGrow:diff()}.
AVEMUJICA-PURSUIT_OF_MASTERY.title: Pursuit of Mastery
AVEMUJICA-GIBBOUS_MOON_ENVY.title: Gibbous Moon's Envy
AVEMUJICA-EXPLOSIVE_FINALE.description: Whenever you finish [gold]Composing[/gold] a [gold]Song[/gold], deal {ExplosiveFinalePower:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
AVEMUJICA-EXPLOSIVE_FINALE.title: Explosive Finale
AVEMUJICA-FRUSTRATION.description: Whenever a card is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], gain {FrustrationPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
AVEMUJICA-FRUSTRATION.title: Frustration
AVEMUJICA-RONDO.title: Rondo in Orange
AVEMUJICA-INSPIRING_DANCE.description: Another player gains X{IfUpgraded:show:+1} {Energy:energyIcons()} and draws X{IfUpgraded:show:+1} cards.
AVEMUJICA-INSPIRING_DANCE.title: Inspiring Dance
AVEMUJICA-GROUP_PERFORMANCE.description: Whenever you finish [gold]Composing[/gold] a [gold]Song[/gold], also give {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:copy|copies} to ALL other players.
AVEMUJICA-GROUP_PERFORMANCE.title: Group Performance
AVEMUJICA-SPARK.title: Spark of Inspiration
AVEMUJICA-GODDESS_OF_OBLIVION.descriptio:
Gain {Oblivion:diff()} [gold]Oblivion[/gold].
Whenever a card is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], gain {GoddessOfOblivionPower:diff()} [gold]Oblivion[/gold].
AVEMUJICA-GODDESS_OF_OBLIVION.title: Goddess of Oblivion
